title: FoxyVR's Fakemon [Cobblemon]
description: Fakemon Created for the Cobblemon mod and has fakemon like kito, globa and more...
body:
This is a Data pack and a resource pack for the Minecraft Mod Cobblemon where it adds Fakemon's to your game like Nervtual, Kito, Ran, Ma, Ranmaur and more...

also when downloading this pack make sure to put the zip in both resource packs folder and your worlds Data pack folder.
